welcome.title: {appName}
welcome.description: Astro, React, and TypeScript are ready for the team to start building product screens.

register.heading: Event Registration
register.refreshReminderLine2: remind them to refresh their screen.

checkIn.successDescription: You're all set. Remind them to refresh their screen.
checkIn.errorDescription: Something went wrong. Please have them try again.

qrScannerError.permissionDenied: We need permission to use the camera. Please allow camera access, then try again.
qrScannerError.noCamera: We couldn't find a camera on this device. Try another device.
qrScannerError.inUse: The camera is being used by another app or tab. Close it and try again.
qrScannerError.overconstrained: We couldn't start the camera on this device. Please try another one.
qrScannerError.insecureContext: The camera only works on a secure (https) connection. Please open this page over https.
qrScannerError.unsupported: This browser doesn't support the camera. Try a different browser.
qrScannerError.aborted: Starting the camera was interrupted. Please try again.
qrScannerError.security: Your browser blocked camera access. Check your browser settings and try again.
qrScannerError.typeError: Something went wrong while starting the camera. Please try again.
qrScannerError.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
